overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through the bustling streets of Night City. The character navigates sidewalks, pedestrian plazas, and busy intersections beneath towering futuristic buildings and elevated highways, with heavy vehicle traffic and dense commercial signage throughout.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk beneath elevated transit highway

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk under the elevated highway, passing other pedestrians

entered.detail: massive concrete and steel elevated transit structure casting shadows over the street
multi-story building with ground floor shops and large signage
tall palm trees lining the sidewalk edge
futuristic cars and trucks driving along the multi-lane road
large illuminated advertising screens mounted on building facades

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a shaded sidewalk beneath a massive elevated highway overpass. The street is lined with palm trees and commercial buildings, while futuristic vehicles pass by on the left. The lighting is diffused by the overhead structure, creating a contrast between the shaded walkway and the bright street beyond.

scene_state.functional_zone: pedestrian plaza with food vendor stalls

events.description: turns right off the main sidewalk into a semi-covered pedestrian plaza with outdoor seating
exits the plaza through a narrow passage back onto the main street

agents.ego_description: turns right into the plaza, walks past the food stand, then exits back to the street

entered.detail: blue and white food vendor stall with 'CIRKUS' signage and menu displays
bright red outdoor umbrellas shading seating areas
raised concrete platform with tables and benches for dining
ground-level vent emitting steam or smoke

segments.scene_description: The character turns right into a semi-covered pedestrian plaza featuring a 'CIRKUS' food stand with red umbrellas and outdoor seating. The area has a more intimate scale with tiled ground and building walls on multiple sides. After a brief walk through the plaza, the character exits back to the main street.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy urban intersection with marked crosswalks

events.description: crosses the multi-lane street at a marked crosswalk while vehicles wait at the intersection
turns left to follow the sidewalk path along the main thoroughfare

agents.ego_description: crosses the street at the crosswalk and continues walking along the busy road with other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: futuristic green sedan drives past the crosswalk

entered.detail: white and red striped pedestrian crossing markings on the asphalt
tall traffic signal poles with multiple lights
red sign indicating road closure on the right side
yellow and black striped construction barriers lining the sidewalk edge

segments.scene_description: Exiting the plaza, the character crosses a wide sunlit intersection with dense traffic. The ground shifts to asphalt crosswalk markings as futuristic vehicles pass by. The character navigates around construction barriers and continues along the busy downtown street.

scene_state.functional_zone: major downtown intersection with giant advertising displays and heavy traffic

events.description: pauses at the intersection corner to wait for a gap in the heavy vehicle traffic
resumes walking across the intersection as traffic clears

agents.ego_description: waits at the corner for traffic to pass, then continues walking through the busy intersection

notable_agents.action: futuristic black sedan drives through the intersection

entered.detail: massive curved advertising screen displaying 'All Night Every Night' with a figure
large purple billboard with 'Set Sail' advertisement
tall building with angular architecture and multiple advertising screens

segments.scene_description: The character navigates a major downtown intersection dominated by massive digital billboards and futuristic architecture. Heavy traffic flows through the intersection as the character waits for a gap before crossing. The scene is brightly lit with direct sunlight reflecting off the glass and metal surfaces of the towering buildings.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a shaded urban corridor into the blindingly bright, open expanse of a futuristic downtown intersection. It begins with the character walking along a sidewalk beneath the heavy shadow of a massive elevated highway overpass, flanked by palm trees and passing vehicles. As the character turns right, the scene shifts into a more intimate, semi-covered pedestrian plaza featuring a Cirkus food stand with red umbrellas before leading back out toward the main road. The camera then follows the character across a wide, sunlit asphalt intersection filled with dense traffic and construction barriers. Finally, the environment opens up completely into a major downtown hub dominated by towering glass architecture and massive digital billboards reflecting the direct glare of the sun.
